title: Project Report: Enterprise Document Intelligence Platform — Generative AI Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Multi-tenant RAG with hybrid search, reranking, guardrails, and admin analytics dashboard.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**Enterprise Document Intelligence Platform** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for Generative AI Engineer. Duration: 5–6 weeks. Multi-tenant RAG with hybrid search, reranking, guardrails, and admin analytics dashboard. Tools: LangChain, Elasticsearch, OpenAI, React.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Hybrid search (BM25 + vector)
Objective: Cross-encoder reranking
Objective: PII redaction guardrails
Objective: Admin dashboard with usage analytics
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Generative AI Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Generative AI Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Generative AI Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Hybrid
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Hybrid** *(Level: Advanced)*

BM25 + vector fusion. Complete these tasks: Reciprocal rank fusion; Tuning. Deliverable for this phase: Search quality benchmark.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Reciprocal rank fusion
- [ ] Tuning
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Hybrid is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Generative AI Engineer agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the Search quality benchmark to the teacher.

chapters.title: Phase: Rerank
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Rerank** *(Level: Advanced)*

Cross-encoder reranker. Complete these tasks: Top-20 → Top-5; Latency test. Deliverable for this phase: Reranker eval.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Top-20 → Top-5
- [ ] Latency test
```

chapters.title: Phase: Guardrails
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Guardrails** *(Level: Advanced)*

PII filter + topic block. Complete these tasks: Regex + LLM check; Audit log. Deliverable for this phase: Safety test cases.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] Regex + LLM check
- [ ] Audit log
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Guardrails is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it

### Where to use it
Generative AI Engineer agile sprints and coursework milestones.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: Platform demo; Search benchmark; Safety test report; Admin dashboard. Skills demonstrated: Hybrid search, Safety, Enterprise RAG. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Platform demo
Deliverable: Search benchmark
Deliverable: Safety test report
Deliverable: Admin dashboard
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Platform demo and passes the rubric.
key_takeaways: Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.
